Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c 'from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory; from pathlib import Path; from unittest.mock import patch; from agent.graph.build_graph import build_graph; from agent.state import AgentState, Interface, Parameter, Mode, RunStatus, Step, StepStatus, StepOutcome; import agent.nodes.coder_node as coder_module; graph=build_graph\(\); step=Step\(id="R001-S01", description="搭建登录页面 UI", implementation_file="src/generated_success.py", status=StepStatus.PENDING, interface=Interface\(name="build_login_ui", parameters=[Parameter\(name="username", type="str"\)], return_type="None", description="Build the login UI.", dependencies=[]\)\); code_block=\(chr\(96\)*3\)+"python\\ndef build_login_ui\(username: str\) -> None:\\n    return None\\n"+\(chr\(96\)*3\); 
with TemporaryDirectory\(\) as tmp:
    def fake_call_gpt\(*, messages, **kwargs\): return {"choices":[{"message":{"content":code_block}}]}
    def fake_write_file\(path, content\): p=Path\(tmp\)/path; p.parent.mkdir\(parents=True, exist_ok=True\); p.write_text\(content, encoding="utf-8"\); return f"File written successfully: {path}"
    with patch.object\(coder_module, "call_gpt", fake_call_gpt\), patch.object\(coder_module, "get_workspace_skeleton_direct", lambda workspace_root: "skeleton"\), patch.object\(coder_module, "write_file", fake_write_file\):
        result = graph.invoke\(AgentState\(session_id="session-1", mode=Mode.EXECUTING, run_status=RunStatus.RUNNING, workspace_root=tmp, plan=[step]\), config={"recursion_limit": 8}\)
    assert result["plan"][0].status == StepStatus.SUCCESS
    assert result["last_outcome"] == StepOutcome.SUCCESS
    assert result["run_status"] == RunStatus.SUCCESS
print\("smoke-ok"\)')
